framework.name: Health Data Hosting Certification (HDS)
framework.name_nl: Certification Hebergeurs de Donnees de Sante (HDS)
framework.scope: Certification requirements for organizations hosting French health data, mandatory under Article L.1111-8 of the Public Health Code
framework.structure_description: Requirements organized by hosting activity: physical infrastructure, network infrastructure, managed hosting, operations management, externalized backup, and certification. Based on ISO 27001 with health-sector extensions.

controls.title: Physical infrastructure security
controls.description: Data centers hosting health data shall meet Tier III or equivalent availability requirements.
controls.description_nl: Les centres de donnees hebergeant des donnees de sante doivent respecter les exigences de disponibilite Tier III ou equivalent.

controls.title: Physical access control
controls.description: Multi-layer physical access controls shall protect data center facilities.
controls.description_nl: Des controles d'acces physiques multicouches doivent proteger les installations du centre de donnees.

controls.title: Environmental protection
controls.description: Fire detection/suppression, flooding protection, and climate control shall be implemented.
controls.description_nl: La detection/extinction d'incendie, la protection contre les inondations et la climatisation doivent etre mises en oeuvre.

controls.title: Power redundancy
controls.description: Redundant power supplies with UPS and generator backup shall ensure continuous operation.
controls.description_nl: Des alimentations electriques redondantes avec onduleur et groupe electrogene doivent assurer le fonctionnement continu.

controls.title: Physical surveillance
controls.description: Video surveillance and intrusion detection shall monitor data center premises 24/7.
controls.description_nl: La videosurveillance et la detection d'intrusion doivent surveiller les locaux du centre de donnees 24h/24.

controls.title: Network security architecture
controls.description: Network architecture shall implement defense in depth with DMZ, segmentation, and filtering.
controls.description_nl: L'architecture reseau doit implementer la defense en profondeur avec DMZ, segmentation et filtrage.

controls.title: Network monitoring
controls.description: Network traffic shall be monitored for anomalies and potential security incidents.
controls.description_nl: Le trafic reseau doit etre surveille pour detecter les anomalies et incidents de securite potentiels.

controls.title: Encrypted communications
controls.description: All network communications carrying health data shall be encrypted with TLS 1.2 or higher.
controls.description_nl: Toutes les communications reseau transportant des donnees de sante doivent etre chiffrees avec TLS 1.2 ou superieur.

controls.title: DDoS protection
controls.description: DDoS mitigation measures shall protect the availability of health data hosting services.
controls.description_nl: Des mesures d'attenuation DDoS doivent proteger la disponibilite des services d'hebergement de donnees de sante.

controls.title: Health data hosting contract
controls.title_nl: Contrat d'hebergement de donnees de sante
controls.description: Hosting contracts shall specify security obligations, audit rights, and data return procedures.
controls.description_nl: Les contrats d'hebergement doivent preciser les obligations de securite, les droits d'audit et les procedures de restitution des donnees.

controls.title: Tenant isolation
controls.description: Logical isolation shall prevent cross-tenant access to health data.
controls.description_nl: L'isolation logique doit empecher l'acces croise entre locataires aux donnees de sante.

controls.title: Health data localization
controls.description: Health data shall be hosted within France or the European Union.
controls.description_nl: Les donnees de sante doivent etre hebergees en France ou dans l'Union europeenne.

controls.title: Sub-processor management
controls.description: Sub-processors shall be declared to customers and shall meet equivalent security requirements.
controls.description_nl: Les sous-traitants doivent etre declares aux clients et doivent respecter des exigences de securite equivalentes.

controls.title: Security operations center
controls.description: A SOC shall monitor health data hosting infrastructure 24/7.
controls.description_nl: Un SOC doit surveiller l'infrastructure d'hebergement de donnees de sante 24h/24 7j/7.

controls.title: Patch management
controls.description: Security patches shall be assessed and deployed within defined timeframes.
controls.description_nl: Les correctifs de securite doivent etre evalues et deployes dans des delais definis.

controls.title: Incident response
controls.description: Incident response procedures shall be documented and tested, with notification to clients and authorities.
controls.description_nl: Les procedures de reponse aux incidents doivent etre documentees et testees, avec notification aux clients et autorites.

controls.title: Vulnerability management
controls.description: Regular vulnerability assessments and penetration tests shall be conducted.
controls.description_nl: Des evaluations de vulnerabilites et des tests d'intrusion reguliers doivent etre conduits.

controls.title: Change management
controls.description: Changes to hosting infrastructure shall follow a formal change management process.
controls.description_nl: Les changements a l'infrastructure d'hebergement doivent suivre un processus formel de gestion des changements.

controls.title: Backup policy
controls.description: A backup policy shall define backup frequency, retention, encryption, and testing procedures.
controls.description_nl: Une politique de sauvegarde doit definir la frequence, la retention, le chiffrement et les procedures de test.

controls.title: Backup encryption
controls.description: Backups of health data shall be encrypted during transfer and at rest.
controls.description_nl: Les sauvegardes de donnees de sante doivent etre chiffrees pendant le transfert et au repos.

controls.title: Backup restoration testing
controls.description: Backup restoration shall be tested regularly to verify data integrity and recoverability.
controls.description_nl: La restauration des sauvegardes doit etre testee regulierement pour verifier l'integrite des donnees et la capacite de reprise.

controls.title: Geographic backup separation
controls.description: Backup copies shall be stored in a geographically separate location from the primary data.
controls.description_nl: Les copies de sauvegarde doivent etre stockees dans un lieu geographiquement separe des donnees primaires.

controls.title: ISO 27001 certification
controls.description: HDS providers shall hold ISO 27001 certification covering the hosting perimeter.
controls.description_nl: Les hebergeurs HDS doivent detenir la certification ISO 27001 couvrant le perimetre d'hebergement.

controls.title: HDS certification scope
controls.description: The HDS certification scope shall cover all activities related to health data hosting.
controls.description_nl: Le perimetre de certification HDS doit couvrir toutes les activites liees a l'hebergement de donnees de sante.

controls.title: Annual HDS audit
controls.description: An annual audit by an accredited body shall verify continued compliance with HDS requirements.
controls.description_nl: Un audit annuel par un organisme accredite doit verifier la conformite continue aux exigences HDS.

controls.title: Data center location in France/EU
controls.title_nl: Localisation du centre de donnees en France/UE
controls.description: Primary and backup data centers shall be located in France or the European Union.
controls.description_nl: Les centres de donnees principaux et de secours doivent etre situes en France ou dans l'Union europeenne.

controls.title: Telecommunications redundancy
controls.description: Telecommunications connections shall be redundant with diverse physical paths.
controls.description_nl: Les connexions de telecommunications doivent etre redondantes avec des chemins physiques diversifies.

controls.title: Network penetration testing
controls.description: Network penetration tests shall be conducted at least annually by an independent PASSI-qualified auditor.
controls.description_nl: Des tests d'intrusion reseau doivent etre conduits au moins annuellement par un auditeur PASSI qualifie independant.

controls.title: IDS/IPS deployment
controls.description: Intrusion detection and prevention systems shall monitor all network entry points.
controls.description_nl: Les systemes de detection et prevention d'intrusion doivent surveiller tous les points d'entree reseau.

controls.title: Data return procedures
controls.description: Contract termination procedures shall guarantee complete return of health data to the client.
controls.description_nl: Les procedures de fin de contrat doivent garantir la restitution complete des donnees de sante au client.

controls.title: Data portability format
controls.description: Health data shall be returnable in a standard, interoperable format (HL7 FHIR, CDA, CSV).
controls.description_nl: Les donnees de sante doivent etre restituables dans un format standard et interoperable (HL7 FHIR, CDA, CSV).

controls.title: Secure data destruction at contract end
controls.title_nl: Destruction securisee des donnees en fin de contrat
controls.description: All health data shall be securely destroyed after return, with certificate of destruction provided to client.
controls.description_nl: Toutes les donnees de sante doivent etre detruites de maniere securisee apres restitution, avec un certificat de destruction fourni au client.

controls.title: Access management for health data
controls.title_nl: Gestion des acces aux donnees de sante
controls.description: Access to health data shall require named accounts with multi-factor authentication.
controls.description_nl: L'acces aux donnees de sante doit necessiter des comptes nominatifs avec authentification multifacteur.

controls.title: Security monitoring and alerting
controls.description: Real-time security monitoring with defined alerting thresholds for health data infrastructure.
controls.description_nl: Surveillance de securite en temps reel avec des seuils d'alerte definis pour l'infrastructure de donnees de sante.

controls.title: Compliance reporting
controls.description: Monthly compliance reports shall be provided to clients covering availability, incidents, and security metrics.
controls.description_nl: Des rapports de conformite mensuels doivent etre fournis aux clients couvrant la disponibilite, les incidents et les metriques de securite.

controls.title: Cross-site backup replication
controls.description: Backups shall be replicated to a secondary HDS-certified site for disaster recovery.
controls.description_nl: Les sauvegardes doivent etre repliquees vers un site secondaire certifie HDS pour la reprise apres sinistre.

controls.title: ISO 27018 alignment
controls.description: HDS providers processing personal health data in the cloud shall align with ISO 27018 controls.
controls.description_nl: Les hebergeurs HDS traitant des donnees de sante personnelles dans le cloud doivent s'aligner sur les controles ISO 27018.

controls.title: SOC 2 reporting
controls.description: HDS providers shall make SOC 2 Type II reports available to clients upon request.
controls.description_nl: Les hebergeurs HDS doivent mettre les rapports SOC 2 Type II a disposition des clients sur demande.
